title: T-020 — UI: RPT-006 Inventory Aging + RPT-007 WO Status + RPT-008 Shipment OTD pages (12-REPORTING §15.1 RPT-006..008)
prompt:
# T-020 — Operational dashboards UI (Inventory Aging + WO Status + Shipment OTD)

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §15.1 RPT-006/RPT-007/RPT-008, §4.1 #6/#7/#8
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes:
- RPT-006: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/kpi-screens.jsx:313-466 (`rpt_inventory_aging`)
- RPT-007: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/kpi-screens.jsx:470-585 (`rpt_wo_status`)
- RPT-008: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/kpi-screens.jsx:588-706 (`rpt_shipment_otd`)

## Goal
Three Server Component pages reading from T-007 service helpers (inventory-aging, wo-status, shipment-otd). RPT-008 must handle T-007's graceful-degradation path for 11-SHIPPING-absent case.

## Prototype parity
- RPT-006: 4 sections (ChartStackedBarH by age bucket / Expiry Alerts table / Slow-moving SKUs / by-category breakdown) — Suspense per section; cross-module LP link → /warehouse/license-plates/<lp>.
- RPT-007: WO funnel (status counts) + WO table w/ cross-module link → /production/work-orders/<wo> + WIP-by-line progress bar (shadcn Progress).
- RPT-008: ChartLine OTD trend w/ 95% ReferenceLine + by-customer Spark + Late Shipments conditional table; rendered only when shipment data available.

## Implementation contract
1. Three RSC pages + client components reading from T-007 helpers. Each handles its own filter URL state (warehouse / category / line / customer / week).
2. Cross-module link builders for LP / WO / shipment (UUID/code validation).
3. RPT-008: when T-007 reports 11-SHIPPING absent, render full-card placeholder.
4. WIP progress bar reuses shadcn Progress primitive.
5. Empty / loading / error / permission states per page; RTL + Playwright parity for ALL three.
6. next-intl `reporting.{inventory_aging,wo_status,shipment_otd}.*` keys.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/inventory-aging/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/inventory-aging/_components/inventory-aging-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/inventory-aging/__tests__/inventory-aging.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/wo-status/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/wo-status/_components/wo-status-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/wo-status/__tests__/wo-status.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/shipment-otd/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/shipment-otd/_components/shipment-otd-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/shipment-otd/__tests__/shipment-otd.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/{en,pl}/reporting-operational.json [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given mv_inventory_aging seeded with LPs in 4 age buckets for org_A, when /reporting/inventory-aging renders, then stacked bar shows the 4 buckets + Expiry Alerts table appears + slow-moving SKUs section appears.
2. Given mv_wo_status_summary seeded with WOs in 5 statuses, when /reporting/wo-status renders, then funnel renders with clickable segments (URL searchParam filter) + WO table cross-module-links to /production/work-orders/<wo>.
3. Given 11-SHIPPING module is NOT deployed (T-007 returns available=false for shipment), when /reporting/shipment-otd renders, then full-card placeholder is shown with 'Shipping module not deployed' message; no errors.
4. Given 11-SHIPPING IS deployed with seeded shipments, when /reporting/shipment-otd renders, then ChartLine shows OTD trend + 95% ReferenceLine, by-customer table w/ sparklines, Late Shipments conditional table (only when lateCount > 0).
5. Given LP code = 'LP-000123', when 'View LP' is clicked, then router.push('/warehouse/license-plates/LP-000123'); invalid formats rejected.
6. Given user without rpt.dashboard.view, when accessing any of the 3 pages, then middleware T-009 403s + audits each.
7. UI parity for ALL THREE pages with Playwright traces; 4 states tested; next-intl wrapping verified.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: RTL covers all 3 pages incl. degradation path, cross-module links, filter URL state.
- Playwright parity per prototype for ALL THREE.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web test inventory-aging wo-status shipment-otd && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting-operational`.
- GREEN: build 3 RSC pages + clients.

## Risk red lines
- Do not crash shipment page when 11-SHIPPING absent — graceful placeholder via T-007.
- Do not let cross-module links accept raw codes — server-side format validation.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not skip next-intl wrapping.
- Do not skip 4 states per page (UI parity policy).
- Do not include real-time WO queries on hot path — read mv_wo_status_summary (D-RPT-1).

pipeline_inputs.description: Three operational dashboard pages (Inventory Aging + WO Status + Shipment OTD). Shipment page handles 11-SHIPPING-absent path gracefully.
pipeline_inputs.details: Three RSC pages reading T-007 service helpers. Cross-module links to /warehouse/license-plates/<lp>, /production/work-orders/<wo>, /shipping/shipments/<ship>. Each page has its own RTL + Playwright parity test.

Given mv_inventory_aging seeded with LPs in 4 age buckets for org_A, when /reporting/inventory-aging renders, then stacked bar shows 4 buckets + Expiry Alerts + slow-moving SKUs sections

Given mv_wo_status_summary seeded with WOs in 5 statuses, when /reporting/wo-status renders, then funnel with clickable segments (URL searchParam) + WO table cross-module-links to /production/work-orders/<wo>

Given the page/modal is exercised end-to-end, when closeout criteria are verified, then access-control middleware T-009 gates unauthenticated/unauthorized requests with 403 + audit row; empty/loading/error/permission states are rendered per UI parity policy with Playwright trace + screenshot artifacts attached; all visible strings route through next-intl keys (no hardcoded labels).
